Convert string to char codes: (string->list s) -> list of integers
Opening bracket -> push its CODE onto stack for matching later
Closing bracket -> check if (car stack) matches the corresponding opening code
e.g., for ) (41): (and (pair? stack) (= (car stack) 40)) means match
At end, must return (null? stack) — empty stack means balanced
